description: TPI Security Test Lab — BlackUnicorn branded attack fixtures

images.desc: Image files with metadata injection, SVG attacks, format mismatches

audio.desc: Audio files with metadata injection in ID3/RIFF/OGG tags

web.desc: HTML pages with indirect injection vectors

context.desc: Context injection via memory, agent settings, and configuration files

malformed.desc: Malformed files with format mismatches and polyglot attacks

agent-output.desc: Fake agent output and tool calls

search-results.desc: Poisoned search results and SEO manipulation

files.attack: Real-time voice synthesis for security bypass
Physical adversarial patch on security systems
OCR character confusion for content bypass
Hidden text commands in visual content
Physical adversarial stickers for access bypass
Progressive modality switching for security downgrade

dos.desc: Denial of Service attack fixtures - resource exhaustion, flooding, and context overflow attacks

supply-chain.desc: Supply chain attack fixtures - dependency vulnerabilities, model tampering, typosquatting, and component poisoning

agent.desc: AI Agent Security fixtures - credential harvesting, context poisoning, data manipulation, RAG attacks, multi-agent manipulation, and memory extraction

vec.desc: Vector & Embeddings Weaknesses (LLM08) - Indirect injection via embeddings, embedding poisoning, vector DB leakage, SEO-optimized poisoning, similarity attacks

or.desc: Overreliance & Misinformation - tests for automated decision making, code execution without review, professional advice without verification, confidence calibration, source attribution verification, and consistency testing
